zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Of Lorraine於1280年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine17歲，母親Isabelle de Rumigny17歲。她和Erard of Bar至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1353年12月12日享年73歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Of Lorraine于1280年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希时，她的父亲Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine17岁，母亲Isabelle de Rumigny17岁。她和Erard of Bar至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1353年12月12日享年73岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

variants.name: Lorrayne
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin denoting a migrant from the province of Lorraine in eastern France. This derives its name from Latin Lotharingia ‘territory of the people of Lothar’. The latter is a Germanic personal name derived from hlud ‘fame’ + heri, hari ‘army’. Lorraine began to be used as a girl's name in Scotland in the 19th century, and for a time in the second half of the 20th century enjoyed great popularity, which has since waned.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Of Lorraine was born in 1280, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, was 17 and her mother, Isabelle de Rumigny, was 17. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Erard of Bar. She died on 12 December 1353, at the age of 73, and was buried in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Of Lorraine est née en 1280, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Rumigny, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Erard of Bar. Elle est décédée le 12 décembre 1353, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Of Lorraine 1280 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine 17 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Rumigny 17. Sie hatte mit Erard of Bar mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Dezember 1353 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Of Lorraine è nata il nel 1280 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Rumigny, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Erard of Bar. Morì il 12 dicembre 1353, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Of Lorraineが1280年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraineは17歳，母Isabelle de Rumignyは17歳であった。彼女はErard of Barとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1353年12月12日に73歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモンセル-ルeス-ルンeヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Of Lorraine(이)가 1280년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Rumigny(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Erard of Bar(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1353년 12월 12일 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 몬셀-e스-루e빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Of Lorraine nasceu em 1280, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Rumigny, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Erard of Bar. Ela faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1353, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Of Lorraine родилась в 1280 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Rumigny, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Erard of Bar. Она умерла 12 декабря 1353 г. в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности монсел-лeс-лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Of Lorraine nació en 1280, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Theobald De Lorraine II Duke Of Lorraine, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Rumigny, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Erard of Bar. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1353, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultada en Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
